color.palette_type: monochromatic grayscale with a single blue accent; full 10-step accent scales held in reserve for state
color.observed: marketing pages set body to background-200 #fafafa with #171717 text; cards and showcase frames sit on #ffffff; docs/blog use #ffffff
color.scale_semantics: each 10-step scale encodes intent, not just lightness: 100 default bg / 200 hover bg / 300 active bg / 400 default border / 500 hover border / 600 active border / 700 solid fill / 800 solid fill hover / 900 secondary text / 1000 primary text

accents.note: blue = success/links/focus, red = errors, amber = warnings; every accent scale also ships oklch() *-p3 wide-gamut variants. In practice blue appears only in: footer system-status line, docs 'Beta' pill badges, docs syntax highlighting, focus rings — the marketing pages are otherwise 100% grayscale

color.alpha_usage: gray-alpha-* tokens are translucent and layer over any background — use for borders, dividers, overlays, hover states; solid gray-* for text and opaque fills; never swap gray-* for background-*

dark_mode.note: verified live: dark body is pure #000000 with #ededed text; theme follows prefers-color-scheme (html gets light-theme/dark-theme class) and a manual sun/moon/system segmented switcher sits in the footer

color.contrast_strategy: high contrast dark-on-light (or light-on-dark); hold WCAG AA 4.5:1 for body text; color signals state or hierarchy, never decoration; never state by color alone

typography.heading_font: Geist Sans — variable font; loaded as GeistSans + 'GeistSans Fallback'
typography.mono_font: Geist Mono (fallback ui-monospace/SF Mono) — code, data, tabular figures, and all marketing eyebrows/feature-lists

heading_scale.heading_56: 56px / lh 56px / ls -3.36px  (verified: every section h2 on /home)
heading_scale.heading_14: 14px / lh 20px / ls -0.28px  (footer column titles at weight 500)

typography.heading_weight_split: design.md specifies weight 600 for headings, but the live marketing site renders display headings at variable weights 400 (h1) and 450 (h2) — thin-feeling, tightly-tracked, solid-set (line-height = font-size). Product UI (docs) uses the heavier 600. Both are Geist Sans
typography.label_scale: label-20…label-12 at weight 400, tight single-line line-heights (nav, form labels, table headers, metadata); label-14 is the workhorse
typography.mono_usage_observed: Geist Mono carries all marketing meta-text: hero eyebrows ('FOR CODING AGENTS…', 16px, uppercase, #4d4d4d), feature checklists under showcases (14px, text-transform: uppercase, #171717), 'NEW' badges, 'POPULAR' badge, terminal/CLI demos, footer status line
typography.tracking_rule: letter-spacing tightens as size grows — -0.28px at 14px up to -4.32px at 72px (-0.06em); heading line-height equals font-size at display sizes
typography.weight_discipline: never more than two weights in one view; marketing: 400/450 headings + 400 body + 500 buttons; product: 600 headings + 400 body

spacing.rhythm_rule: three-step rhythm: 8px inside a group, 16px between groups, 32-40px between sections
spacing.density: marketing pages are extremely airy — hero and each showcase get near-full-viewport vertical bands with huge empty margins; product UI (docs) is comfortable-compact

layout.max_content_width: 1200px centered column for product UI; marketing /home runs edge-to-edge with 24px page gutters and full-bleed hairline-separated bands (main has no max-width)
layout.homepage_structure: sticky 64px nav → full-viewport hero (left: h1 + CTA pair; center: canvas triangle; right: mono eyebrow list) → grayscale customer logo bar (Blackbox, Schwab, DoorDash, OpenAI, Supreme, Weather Co, Polymarket) → three customer showcases (Notion / Zapier / Mintlify), each = 56px h2 + framed product screenshot + '<Customer> powers…' aside with mono uppercase Features list → 'Recently shipped' 2-col card grid → centered CTA ('Built by you, or your agents' + Deploy button + copyable npx command) → 12-column sitemap footer
layout.showcase_pattern: text column and screenshot alternate sides section to section; the customer name in the aside is gray #a8a8a8 while the claim is #171717
layout.footer: 6 columns x 2 rows of 14px/500 column titles + 14px/400 links; 'NEW' mono badges in hairline boxes; bottom row = triangle logo, blue mono '● ALL SYSTEMS NORMAL.' status link, and a 3-button theme switcher (system/light/dark)
layout.mega_menu: nav dropdowns open a full-width white panel below the header while the page content behind desaturates/dims to gray; 3 columns with 13px gray category labels (Agent Stack / Core Platform / Tools) over 24px weight-450 links; external links get a mono ↗
layout.alignment: hero and section headings left-aligned; final CTA centered; strict grid throughout

shape.usage_observed: 6px: nav/product/docs buttons and inputs; 12px: docs cards, menus; 16px: marketing showcase frames and 'Recently shipped' cards; 9999px (pill): ALL marketing CTAs — hero 'Deploy Now'/'Talk to Sales', pricing 'Start a free trial', /ai campaign buttons (36px tall)
shape.rule: one radius family per view — marketing views are pill+16px, product views are 6px+12px; never mix rounded and sharp corners
shape.border_usage: hairline 1px gray-alpha borders everywhere: card frames, logo-bar dividers, section separators, secondary buttons; borders and tonal surfaces do hierarchy before shadows

elevation.philosophy: tonal surfaces and borders first, shadows stay subtle and low-alpha; marketing screenshots float in hairline-border frames with almost no shadow
elevation.note: tooltips take the lightest shadow; pair each elevation with the matching radius

motion.philosophy: motion only when it clarifies a change, never decoration; 0ms is often the best duration; instant-feeling UI
motion.easing: cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1) — short and physical, slight overshoot
motion.durations: 150ms state changes / 200ms popovers and tooltips / 300ms overlays and modals
motion.rules: no long, looping, or attention-grabbing animation; honor prefers-reduced-motion
motion.observed: homepage sections below the fold mount/reveal on scroll (blank until approached); no GSAP or Three.js in page globals — animation is CSS/React driven

components.button_primary_product: solid gray-1000 (#171717) fill, white label, button-14 (14px/500), 6px radius, 32-40px height (verified nav Sign Up: 32px)
components.button_secondary_product: white fill, hairline gray-alpha border, primary text, 6px radius (verified nav Get a Demo / Log In)
components.button_marketing_cta: pill (9999px), 36px height — dark fill + white text for primary, white fill + hairline border for secondary; hero pair 'Deploy Now'/'Talk to Sales'
components.button_error: solid red-800 #ea001d fill, white text, destructive only
components.input: background-100 fill, translucent border, 6px radius, 40px height; docs search: 6px-radius field with ⌘K keycap hint
components.state_stepping: hover/active step up the scale: fill 100→200→300, border 400→500→600
components.disabled: gray-100 fill, gray-700 text, not-allowed cursor
components.badges_observed: 'NEW'/'POPULAR': tiny Geist Mono uppercase text in a 1px hairline box, sharp-ish corners; 'Beta' (docs): blue-100 bg pill with blue-700 text
components.pricing_cards: full-bleed white 3-column band separated by hairlines (not floating cards); plan name 14px, giant 64px price at display weight, hairline rule, then 14px feature list with 16px stroke icons, pill CTA at bottom
components.blog_cards: white cards on #fafafa, date + gray category meta line, 32px weight-450 title, excerpt, overlapping avatar cluster + author names; pill category filter tabs + search field above
components.code_blocks_docs: white bg, hairline border, 12px radius, filename tab header with copy button; syntax: magenta/pink keywords, green strings, blue types on white
components.terminal_demos_marketing: inset panels inside cards: mono 13-14px, ✓ checkmark lines in green, 'Production:' URL lines, dark or light variants

design_style.mood: minimal, high-contrast, precise, developer-native, quietly monumental
design_style.personality: confident restraint — the triangle logo, grayscale palette, thin oversized Geist headings, and mono meta-text do the branding; color is engineering signal, not decoration
design_style.genre: canonical developer-infrastructure marketing (the style Linear/Raycast-era dev tools descend from) — but currently a LIGHT #fafafa default with a pure-black dark theme, not dark-first
design_style.visual_language: near-total grayscale; whitespace and hairline borders structure everything; Geist Mono uppercase strings act as the 'engineering' texture (eyebrows, feature lists, badges, status lines); real product screenshots framed in hairline cards are the only imagery; the black triangle is treated as a monumental 3D object with a backlit glow
design_style.composition: hero is an asymmetric three-part row: oversized thin two-line headline left, glowing canvas triangle center, mono uppercase eyebrow stack right; sections are near-viewport-height bands with 56px left-aligned statement headings; showcase text/image sides alternate; the page closes with one centered CTA + copyable CLI command
design_style.imagery: no photography, no illustration in the classic sense; customer product screenshots (Notion AI chat, Zapier homepage, Mintlify docs), grayscale customer logos, thin line-art wireframe drawings (isometric outlines) inside 'Recently shipped' cards, terminal transcripts, and the canvas-rendered triangle; /ai campaign page adds hairline grid-paper backgrounds with '+' crosshair intersection markers and black speech-bubble shapes
design_style.ornamentation: essentially none — the grain-glow behind the hero triangle, hairline rules, and mono badges are the entire decorative budget
design_style.whitespace_philosophy: extreme; sections breathe with near-full-viewport spacing; whitespace ranks information before any box or color does; gray steps 1000/900/700 rank primary/secondary/disabled text
design_style.copy_voice: precise, filler-free, agent-obsessed ('Agentic Infrastructure', 'FOR CODING AGENTS', 'Built by you, or your agents'); Title Case labels and buttons, sentence case body; actions are verb+noun; errors state what happened plus what to do next; toasts never say 'successfully'; numerals, curly quotes, real ellipsis; no 'please', no superlatives
design_style.interaction_feel: instant and physical — most interactions at 0ms, slight-overshoot easing when motion is warranted, visible focus rings everywhere; mega-menu dims the page behind it

overview.performance_tier: lightweight-medium — one Canvas 2D hero element, everything else CSS/DOM; no WebGL, no Three.js, no GSAP (verified: window globals absent, canvas context is 2d)
overview.composite_notes: The system doc explicitly discourages decorative motion, so effects concentrate in the hero: a single 1080x720 Canvas 2D rendering of the Vercel triangle as a physical object — in light theme a solid black triangle with a soft radial halo; in dark theme an eclipse-like black triangle rim-lit by a grainy white corona on pure black. Below the fold, sections lazy-reveal on scroll. Product UI is the spectacle; the chrome stays still.

canvas_2d.details: hero triangle scene: Canvas 2D (verified via getContext probing), absolutely positioned inset-0 pointer-events-none behind hero content; renders grain/noise glow around the brand triangle; theme-aware (halo on light, eclipse corona on dark)

background_gradients.details: radial glow/vignette around the hero triangle; dark theme adds a large soft radial white-on-black gradient behind it; no color gradients anywhere — all glows are grayscale

scroll_effects.details: below-fold sections mount/fade in on approach (content is blank until scrolled near); no parallax, no scroll-scrubbing

micro_interactions.details: hover steps surface fill 100→200→300 and border 400→500→600; 150ms state changes with cubic-bezier(0.175,0.885,0.32,1.1); two-layer blue focus ring; copy-to-clipboard affordances on CLI commands and code blocks

animated_ui_demos.details: faux product windows as hero imagery (Notion AI chat with suggestion rows, terminal deploy transcripts with green checkmarks); DOM/CSS driven

grid_paper_texture.details: /ai campaign page only: full-bleed hairline grid with '+' crosshair markers at intersections, black rounded speech-bubble panels floating on it

glassmorphism.note: no frosted-blur panels anywhere; translucency is limited to gray-alpha hairlines

webgl_3d.note: the '3D-looking' hero triangle is Canvas 2D, not WebGL

particles.note: grain in the hero glow is rendered noise, not a particle system

text_effects.note: headlines are static; no split/typewriter/gradient text

svg_animations.note: SVGs are static logos (Vercel triangle, customer logos) and stroke icons
